zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Criol II於1260年出生在英國英格蘭肯特艾斯福德時，他的父親Nicholas de Crioll40歲，母親Joan Auberville35歲。他於1272年2月10日與Margaret Peache在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1303年9月19日在英國英格蘭肯特海享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Criol II于1260年出生在英国英格兰肯特艾斯福德时，他的父亲Nicholas de Crioll40岁，母亲Joan Auberville35岁。他于1272年2月10日与Margaret Peache在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1303年9月19日在英国英格兰肯特海享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Criol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alberto, Hipolito, Luis, Eriberto, Jose, Luisa, Ramon, Ricardo.  French/Haitian Edwige, Fritz, Serge, Yvrose.
Catalan: from the old personal name Oriol, from Latin Aureolus.

Catalan and French: nickname, possibly for a flamboyant dresser or sweet singer, from Catalan and Old French oriol ‘oriole’ (from Latin aureolus ‘golden’), a species of bird of which the male has bright yellow and black plumage. As a surname of French origin it is also common in Haiti.

variants.name: Oriel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English and Old French female personal name Oriold, Oriel, from ancient Germanic Aurildis, Orieldis, composed of elements meaning ‘fire’ + ‘strife’.
French (Vosges): nickname from Old French oriel, a variant of oriol ‘oriole’ (see Oriol ).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Criol II was born in 1260, in Eynsford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas de Crioll, was 40 and his mother, Joan Auberville, was 35. He married Margaret Peache on 10 February 1272, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 September 1303, in Hythe, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Criol II est né en 1260, à Eynsford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Crioll, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan Auberville, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Peache le 10 février 1272, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 septembre 1303, à Hythe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Criol II 1260 in Eynsford, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Crioll 40 und seine Mutter Joan Auberville 35. Er hat am 10. Februar 1272 in England Margaret Peache geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. September 1303 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Hythe, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Criol II è nato il nel 1260 nel Eynsford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas de Crioll, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Joan Auberville, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Peache il 10 febbraio 1272, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 settembre 1303, nel Hythe, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Criol IIが1260年にイギリスイギリスケントエインスフォードで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Criollは40歳，母Joan Aubervilleは35歳であった。1272年2月10日にイギリスでMargaret Peacheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1303年9月19日にイギリスイギリスケントhイスで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Criol II(이)가 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Crioll(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Auberville(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1272년 2월 10일 영국에서 Margaret Peache(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1303년 9월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 히테에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Criol II nasceu em 1260, em Eynsford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Crioll, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan Auberville, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Peache em 10 de fevereiro de 1272, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de setembro de 1303, em Hythe, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Criol II родился в 1260 г. в местности эинсфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Crioll было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Auberville, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Peache 10 февраля 1272 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 сентября 1303 г. в местности хит, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Criol II nació en 1260, en Eynsford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas de Crioll, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joan Auberville, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Margaret Peache el 10 de febrero de 1272, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de septiembre de 1303, en Hythe, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
